name: Tabby Slime
description:
🎊WINNER: Literally won from the wheel🎊

I swear gang, I ain't tryna be… Probably the next Thompsone… Sup, gang

I know there were some other pics of Tabby Slimes in E621 (Yeah that's where I got the image from), so instead, I chose this. Oh and also, I know there's like three of them, but... WHERE THE PLUS SIZE AT?

So, to explain this, I was thinking of you as a rancher, but I said SCREW IT, I'mma let y'all explore The Dry Reef, yeah I'mma let y'all encounter those slimes. But, it is your choice... Either be a rancher or a normal person... Or you're just gonna take pics of them like a wildlife photographer. But yeah, it's just you exploring The Dry Reef and witnessing some wild Tabby Slimes around just in their habitats.

Forgot to mention, but I know Tabby Slimes appear in other location, both in Slime Rancher and Slime Rancher. But I rather choose The Dry Reef.

ART BY SLEEPYNEZU
creator: GRIMKid 0
